_meta.note: Researched seed pairs with table-facing fields. All ESTIMATED until real match results are imported. scoreSeed is a rough 0-100 anchor; the live engine computes the shown scores.

seededPairs.deckThesis: This deck wants to reuse enters triggers by using Marvelous flicker effects with Blink value creatures.
seededPairs.mainRisk: The deck can draw support without enough strong targets.

seededPairs.deckThesis: This deck wants to win creature combat by using Equipped payoffs with Armed weapon density.
seededPairs.mainRisk: The deck can stumble if it draws gear without enough creatures.

seededPairs.deckThesis: This deck wants to build an artifact board by using Iron Man artifact support with Vehicles pressure.
seededPairs.mainRisk: The deck needs enough creatures to crew Vehicles and defend early.

seededPairs.deckThesis: This deck wants to chain spells by using Scarlet storm pressure with Kang Dynasty flashback and time-magic support.
seededPairs.mainRisk: The deck has a higher ceiling and a higher stumble rate.

seededPairs.deckThesis: This deck wants to use Robot bodies and artifact pressure to turn spell play into board advantage.
seededPairs.mainRisk: The two halves need enough artifact density to fully connect.

seededPairs.deckThesis: This deck wants to go wide and attack by using Battalion mass-attack rewards with Wakanda tokens.
seededPairs.mainRisk: The deck can stall into a sweeper or oversized blockers.

seededPairs.deckThesis: This deck wants to grind the graveyard by using Tenacious self-mill with Returned recursion.
seededPairs.mainRisk: The deck struggles against graveyard hate or a slow start.

seededPairs.deckThesis: This deck wants to draw extra cards by using Atlantis card draw with Geniuses draw payoffs.
seededPairs.mainRisk: The deck can durdle and fall behind fast starts.

seededPairs.deckThesis: This deck wants to grind a stable board by using Animal creatures with Caretakers lifegain.
seededPairs.mainRisk: The deck has a lower ceiling than combo or artifact pairs.

seededPairs.deckThesis: This deck wants to attack fast by using Speedy haste with Boosted counters.
seededPairs.mainRisk: The deck can run out of gas if the game goes long.
